meta.tagline: Bullion Desk · Gold Buyer · Fine Jewelry
meta.description_default: Giallo Oro Firenze — OAM-registered bullion desk in Florence. Gold buyer, sovereigns, LBMA bars, certified appraisals and bespoke jewelry since 2008.
hero.subtitle: Transparent bullion desk: daily London Gold Fixing price, free in-store appraisal, immediate traceable payment.
home.value.title: Why Giallo Oro Firenze
home.value.subtitle: Four concrete guarantees for those who sell or buy gold in Florence.
home.value.item1_d: Daily updated gold and silver quotes, visible online. No surprise offers.
home.value.item2_d: In-store valuation at no cost. If you decline the offer, you pay nothing.
home.value.item3_d: Contextual payout by traceable bank transfer (OAM compliance).
home.value.item4_d: Verifiable OAM registration. Full anti-money-laundering traceability.
home.services.title: Our services
home.services.subtitle: Four business lines, one philosophy: verifiable transparency.
home.services.s1_d: We purchase scrap gold, 925/800 silver, coins and ingots. Price calculated in front of you on today's London Gold Fixing.
home.services.s2_d: Divisible sovereigns and LBMA-certified 24kt bars from a few grams up to 5 kg.
home.services.s3_d: Unique pieces, GIA-certified stones, upcycling of heirloom jewelry preserving sentimental value.
home.services.s4_d: Written appraisals for inheritance, partition, insurance. Gemologist-signed document.
home.numbers.title: Numbers that tell who we are
home.how.title: How it works
home.how.subtitle: From valuation to payment in 4 steps. Average time in store: 15 minutes.
home.how.s1_d: Appointment via WhatsApp or walk-in. Bring your items and a valid ID.
home.how.s2_d: Purity (kt) with touchstone and acids, weight on certified scale, today's London Gold Fixing.
home.how.s3_d: Transparent written offer: weight, purity, quote, total value. No pressure to accept.
home.how.s4_d: If you accept, immediate traceable bank transfer per OAM AML rules. Signed contract, copy for you.

faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most often. Can't find yours? Write to us.
compro_oro.title: Sell gold and silver in Florence
compro_oro.answer: Giallo Oro Firenze buys scrap gold, 925/800 silver, coins and ingots at a transparent price calculated on today's London Gold Fixing, with free in-store appraisal and immediate traceable bank-transfer payment.
compro_oro.what_gold: Gold jewelry 9kt, 14kt, 18kt, 22kt, 24kt — even broken, unpaired or unwearable.
compro_oro.what_silver: Silver 925 and 800: trays, flatware sets, candelabra, ornaments and coins.
compro_oro.what_coins: Gold coins: sovereigns, marenghi, 20 Lire, Krugerrand, American Eagle, Panda.
compro_oro.what_scrap: Scrap gold, gold-plated (gold portion only), jewelry workshop drips.
compro_oro.what_not_list: Dental gold · unmarked costume jewelry · non-certifiable gold
compro_oro.doc_list: Valid ID · Tax code (codice fiscale) · Original purchase receipt if available (not mandatory)
investimento.title: Investing in physical gold
investimento.answer: Buy divisible gold sovereigns and LBMA-certified 24kt bars (from 1g to 5kg) directly in store or with tracked delivery across Italy. Price updated daily on the London Gold Fixing.
investimento.sterline_text: Bullion coin 22kt (7.32g fine gold). Ideal for small investment cuts — divisible by selling one at a time. Queen Victoria, Edward VII, George V and Elizabeth II vintages available.
investimento.lingotti_text: Available sizes: 1g, 5g, 10g, 20g, 50g, 100g, 250g, 500g, 1kg, 5kg. Authenticity certificate included, serial traceability, LBMA Good Delivery stamp.
gioielleria.title: Bespoke jewelry and upcycling
gioielleria.answer: Giallo Oro Firenze creates unique pieces in gold and GIA/IGI-certified stones, and regenerates heirloom jewelry transforming it into new pieces while preserving the original precious metal.
gioielleria.custom_text: From sketch to finished piece: we design together, show 3D renders, craft in our in-house workshop. 18kt gold or platinum, certified stones.
gioielleria.upcycling_text: We transform inherited rings, necklaces and bracelets into contemporary pieces reusing the original gold. Sentimental value stays, design becomes current.
perizie.title: Certified appraisals
perizie.answer: Giallo Oro Firenze performs written technical appraisals for jewelry, investment gold and inheritance estates, signed by a certified gemologist, valid for successions, partitions, insurance and banking purposes.
perizie.gem_text: Stone authenticity, carat, color, clarity (GIA 4C method). Declared insurance value.
perizie.legacy_text: Complete appraisal of jewelry, coins and investment gold for succession or partition among heirs. Signed valuation document.
perizie.insurance_text: Replacement valuation for jewelry insurance policy. Annual update available.
chi_siamo.title: About us
chi_siamo.answer: Giallo Oro Firenze is a bullion desk and jewelry store active since 2008 in Via del Ponte Sospeso in Florence, registered with the OAM (Italian registry of agents and intermediaries) with full anti-money-laundering traceability.
sterline.title: Gold Sovereign
sterline.subtitle: History, fine weight, vintages and in-store purchase.
sterline.answer: The Gold Sovereign is a British 22kt bullion coin weighing 7.98 g total with 7.32 g of fine gold, issued by the Royal Mint since 1817. In Florence you can buy or sell one at the daily London Gold Fixing price at Giallo Oro Firenze, paid in cash or traceable bank transfer, with fully verifiable authenticity.
sterline.history_intro: Struck by the Royal Mint since 1817, the modern Gold Sovereign has lived through four reigns and two world wars, remaining a recognised store of value worldwide.
sterline.m1_desc: "Young Head", "Jubilee Head" and "Old Head" sovereigns. The longest continuous issue.
sterline.m2_desc: Nine vintages, design by George William de Saulles. Highly sought by collectors.
sterline.m3_desc: Last sovereign in regular circulation before the UK left the gold standard in 1931.
sterline.m4_desc: Reissued as bullion in 1957. Five different portraits during the UK's longest reign.
sterline.why_1_d: Like all certified investment gold (EU directive), the Gold Sovereign is 100% VAT exempt.
sterline.why_2_d: Unlike bars, you can sell one sovereign at a time without unwinding the whole position.
sterline.why_3_d: Recognised and priced worldwide. Easy to resell at any serious bullion desk.
sterline.why_4_d: 26% capital gain only on profit at sale. Holding period is fully tax-free.
sterline.buy_text: Availability verified in real time. Contact us for quantities over 50 pieces or specific vintages.
sterline.price_disclaimer: Price based on the daily London Gold Fixing. Final value confirmed at purchase in store.
